atlas_continuation_prompt: AO Atlas: load Mission record, event index, final rollup, and current readiness; select exactly one ready bounded node; return Foundry import material and no-authority readback.

feature_depth_recommendations.task: Verify final response remains denied while ready nodes remain in the Atlas workgraph.
feature_depth_recommendations.gate: Final response is blocked when ready_nodes_remaining is greater than zero.

feature_depth_recommendations.task: Select exactly one ready Atlas node for the next bounded implementation handoff.
feature_depth_recommendations.gate: Only one executable mutation node can be active.

feature_depth_recommendations.task: Consume the selected ready node and return a run-link or terminal blocker.
feature_depth_recommendations.gate: Foundry returns exactly one run-link or blocker for the selected node.

feature_depth_recommendations.task: Inspect the latest checkpoint/resume bundle before any final response.
feature_depth_recommendations.gate: Checkpoint bundle records route, phase, return gate, and resume prompt.

feature_depth_recommendations.task: Index route, node, CI, PR, rollup, and blocker evidence for the active mission.
feature_depth_recommendations.gate: Event index contains searchable evidence for the active route and ready-node blocker.

feature_depth_recommendations.task: Render compact Mission status showing ready-node denial and exact next action.
feature_depth_recommendations.gate: Command compact readback reports final_response_allowed=false and ready_nodes_remaining=2.

feature_depth_recommendations.task: Record no-promotion summary while ready nodes remain.
feature_depth_recommendations.gate: Promoter does not evaluate promotion while final response is denied.

feature_depth_recommendations.task: Scan changed public readbacks for unsafe wording before node closure.
feature_depth_recommendations.gate: Sentinel scan finds no broad capability or RSI wording.

feature_depth_recommendations.task: Record branch cleanup evidence after the node PR merges.
feature_depth_recommendations.gate: No local or remote codex branch remains for the node after merge.

feature_depth_recommendations.task: Run tests, vet, build, readiness, and public-safety scans over the fixture.
feature_depth_recommendations.gate: Verification output is recorded before node closure.

exact_next_action: continue because ready nodes remain: send the first ready Atlas node to AO Foundry
